_provenance: operator-authored, frozen fixture for cmd/tokendemo. The anti-inflation control: every call is a distinct, legitimate, allow-listed read. No mutating /bad call, no re-read of the same file -> nothing for either lever to save.
_story: The honesty control. A clean coding session ingests the same tokens on BOTH arms (tokens_saved=0): fak does not cry wolf. The gap only opens on a refused bad call (prefilter-bad-calls) or a re-read (reread-same-file).
